examples: Merry Christmas, Santie! So, you call yourself a Mountie! You can't catch me! Why, you couldn't even catch a cold!
So the "mountie", as a member of this police force is known, is not, in fact, often mounted except on a powerful motor-cycle.
"Part of the problem is a laissez-faire attitude on the part of the public, " says Charlie Doucette, a Mountie in charge of drug enforcement in Vancouver.
